title: Everest Base Camp

sections.body:
Introduction

More than just reaching Everest Base Camp, this trek offers amazing experiences from start to finish. It is also one of the most classic routes in Nepal.

Begin your Nepal itinerary in Kathmandu with a warm welcome from your guide at the airport. Two nights in Kathmandu at the beginning of your tour allows for a cultural tour in the heart of Boudha, meals with your trekking companions and guides, and an orientation to cover the details of the tour and packing guidance from your lead guide.

Fly to Lukla, experiencing one of the most breathtaking airport destinations in the world. Trek through highlights of the Sagarmatha National Park such as Namche Bazaar, Tengboche, Dingboche, Lobuche, and Everest Base Camp. See the itinerary below for full details on locations. Trekking concludes in Periche with our exit from the region on helicopter, giving you a scenic flight back to Kathmandu.

Rest for a day in Kathmandu or revisit one of your favorite city highlights before departing the country or connecting to your next adventure in Nepal or in neighboring Bhutan or India.

title: Annapurna Circuit

sections.body:
Introduction

The Annapurna Circuit is one of the greatest treks in Nepal. This classic circuit trek is an incredibly varied and extraordinarily beautiful journey. It includes deep gorges, high mountain passes, Buddhist temples, ethnic Tibetan peoples, picturesque farming villages and all the major mountains of the Annapurna Massif.

plain_text:
Introduction

The Annapurna Circuit is one of the greatest treks in Nepal. This classic circuit trek is an incredibly varied and extraordinarily beautiful journey. It includes deep gorges, high mountain passes, Buddhist temples, ethnic Tibetan peoples, picturesque farming villages and all the major mountains of the Annapurna Massif.

title: Upper Mustang Trekking

sections.body:
Introduction

​​Upper Mustang is known as the land of mysticism. Historically, Mustang's strategic location granted the once-independent kingdom control over the ancient trade route between the Himalayas of Nepal and India. This boosted the region's prosperity and made Mustang a beautiful destination filled with a culture that was rich in vibrancy and very opulent.

Upper Mustang is unlike most other trekking destinations in Nepal. Due to the region's location in the rain-shadow zone of the Annapurna and the Dhaulagiri Mountain Ranges, Mustang receives very little rainfall, giving it an appearance much like that of the Tibetan Plateau.

title: Tiger Leaping Gorge Trekking — Lijiang, Yunnan
categories: Trekking and Hiking in Eastern Tibet

sections.body:
IMPORTANT UPDATE: In response to the May 2021 Gansu ultra-marathon disaster, local authorities in Yunnan have limited access to some area trails. Contact us for up to date information about this trek and other options in the Lijiang area.

 

This classic 2-day trek through the Tiger Leaping Gorge should not be missed. With the peaks of Jade Dragon Snow Mountain towering above and the mighty Yangtze River roaring below, this amazing trek is one of the highlights of China. The trail is dotted with waterfalls and gives you spectacular views of the steep gorge that rises to some 10,000 ft. (3,000 m) above the river!

title: Jade Dragon Snow Mountain Trekking– Lijiang, Yunnan
categories: Trekking and Hiking in Eastern Tibet

sections.body: Update: In response to the May 2021 Gansu Ultra-marathon Disaster, local authorities in Yunnan have limited access to some area trails. Contact us for up to date information on this trek. Most visitors to Lijiang get to see Jade Dragon Snow Mountain (18,360 ft. / 5,596 m) from town or from the viewing platforms and boardwalks in the national park. This one-day trek gives you the opportunity to climb its southern flanks up to an altitude above 13,000 ft. (4,000 m) and enjoy its diverse plant species and mind-blowing vistas from close by!

title: Amdo Overland Experiences

sections.body: Tibet has captivated the hearts of travelers for years. Its mystical, alluring pull bids the adventurous a call that is mixed with excitement and an element of the unknown. Towering peaks, deep valleys, and a rich culture appeal to the adventurous, but it always remains a bit elusive for most. With our diverse team, a long history in the region, and expertise for everything we do, Adventure Access combines the thrill of Tibet’s mountains with rich local encounters. Our Amdo Overland Experiences combine the best elements of travel in Tibet into one itinerary.

With our diverse team, a long history in the region, and expertise for everything we do, Adventure Access combines the thrill of Tibet’s mountains with rich local encounters. Our Amdo Overland Experiences combine the best elements of travel in Tibet into one itinerary.

title: The Nomad Experience

sections.body: Experience the Roof of the World from the perspective of a Tibetan nomad with Adventure Access in a way that provides rich cultural immersion, a hands on experience of daily life, and opportunities to explore the vast plains on horseback or hiking on foot.

plain_text: Experience the Roof of the World from the perspective of a Tibetan nomad with Adventure Access in a way that provides rich cultural immersion, a hands on experience of daily life, and opportunities to explore the vast plains on horseback or hiking on foot.

title: Songpan Mountain Biking - A Different Point of View
Songpan Mountain Biking - The Ridge Route

sections.heading: Mountain Biking Songpan
sections.body:
Good for all types of riders. It is mostly downhill with some uphill sections.

This ride allows for great scenic views of the Songpan countryside and surrounding mountain ranges. Tibetan and Hui villages are passed along the way.

The experience begins at the Adventure Access Songpan Outdoor Center. We shuttle riders and bikes to the trail head on the pass toward Huanglong National Park. Riders will then bike all the way back to the Adventure Access Songpan Outdoor Center in Songpan Old Town.

title: Wilderness Experiences

sections.body: Adventure Access Wilderness Weekends are great fun for everyone. These trips are customizable outdoor adventure trips that are tailored around you and your group’s interests. This kind of trip is ideal for families, clubs, school groups or just a group of friends looking to have a great time outdoors. Because Adventure Access is here to make your trip as easy as possible, we can arrange all the activities you would like to do around Jiuzhaigou and Songpan Counties, Sichuan.

title: Outdoor Experiential Education

sections.body:
There is so much to experience outdoors and Adventure Access wants you to enjoy it. When it comes to education, not everything can be learned in a book or in a classroom. The outdoors is a great place to learn. In the right environment, learning about yourself and the surroundings can be accelerated. Adventure Access Outdoor Education Programs and Tours are designed to help you and your group get out more.

 

Our programs can take many different forms such as low ropes elements, multi-day cultural experiences, adventure experiences, or a combination of all of these. All of our programs are intended to meet the needs of the participants and our vision of getting people outside and using the experience to impact the individuals and groups involved.

title: Jiuzhaigou Trekking
categories: Trekking and Hiking in Eastern Tibet

sections.body:
Jiuzhaigou offers far more than just the National Park. By joining an Adventure Access trek, guided by our staff and local Tibetan guides, you will experience dense, moss laden forests and high alpine peaks. Plan to spend 2-3 days trekking with us from the A Bu Lu Zi Eco Lodge to experience the stunning vistas of Jiuzhaigou, away from the crowds.

 	2-day/ 1-night treks start at 260 USD per person

 	3-day/ 2-night treks start at 415 USD per person

 	All treks begin and end at the A Bu Lu Zi Eco Lodge

 	Pack horses are available for an additional charge of 50 USD per horse per day

title: Mount Zhaga Trekking - Songpan
categories: Trekking and Hiking in Eastern Tibet

title: Xuebaoding Trekking - Songpan
categories: Trekking and Hiking in Eastern Tibet

sections.body: Mount Xuebaoding is a highlight for many visitors to Songpan County, though most only see it from the viewing platform on the way to Huanglong National Park. With an altitude of 18,333ft or 5588m, it is the highest peak in the Minshan Range. It is the most Northeastern of the great peaks that rise out of the Himalayas and forms the Eastern edge of the Tibetan Plateau. Xuebaoding is part of the Huanglong Nature Reserve and is home to diverse plant and wildlife species.
